    "Belt mistracking caused by off-center loading and idler skew",
    "Potential for belt damage, material spillage, and friction-induced fire hazard",

    "Stop the conveyor system immediately and lock out/tag out (LOTO) the power source",
    "Re-align and adjust the skewed idlers according to CEMA standards",
    "Adjust the chute or loading mechanism to ensure center-loading of the belt",
    "Verify all guards are in place per OSHA 1910.212 before restarting"
  ],
  "rationale": "Active belt mistracking due to skewed idlers and off-center loading poses immediate risks of mechanical failure, structural damage, material spillage, and friction fires. The system must be shut down, locked out, and corrected to meet CEMA alignment standards and OSHA guarding requirements.",

    "CEMA Belt Conveyors for Bulk Materials",
    "OSHA 1910.212"
  ]
